mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, payment_channel, amount, status, channel_order_no, paid_at, expire_at, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_payment_order (order_no, user_id, payment_channel, amount, status, expire_at, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{paymentChannel}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_payment_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_payment_order SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_payment_order SET status = 2, channel_order_no = #{channelOrderNo}, paid_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_payment_order SET status = 3, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND (status = 0 OR status = 1) AND deleted = 0
